module.name: krita
post-install:
sed -i '/

Krita is the full-featured digital art studio.<\/p>/i \

This flatpak is community maintained. Please report Flatpak specific bugs that do not occur on the upstream AppImage at https://github.com/flathub/org.kde.krita/issues.

' ${FLATPAK_DEST}/share/metainfo/org.kde.krita.appdata.xml cd ${FLATPAK_DEST}/share/applications rename krita_ org.kde.krita. krita*.desktop hicolordir=${FLATPAK_DEST}/share/icons/hicolor for s in 16 22 32 48 64 128 256 512; do mimetypesdir=${hicolordir}/${s}x${s}/mimetypes mv ${mimetypesdir}/application-x-krita.png ${mimetypesdir}/org.kde.krita.application-x-krita.png done
